description.ko: 생물학적 생명과 디지털 코드가 융합된 미래형 생태계를 탐구하며, 빛나는 네온 식물과 고동치는 데이터 스트림을 보여줍니다.
description.en: An immersive exploration of a futuristic ecosystem where biological life and digital code merge, featuring glowing neon flora and pulsating data streams.

prompt: Hyper-realistic cinematic shot of FLORA-9, a futuristic digital garden. Intricate glowing fiber-optic flowers, translucent leaves with circuit patterns, floating holographic pollen particles, deep forest background with blue and violet bioluminescence, 8k resolution, ethereal lighting, surreal digital nature.
